---
title: "test_telemetry.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/test_telemetry.py"
loc: 24
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.50
style_score: 4.54
intel_score: 3.07
overall_score: 5.34
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_trace. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [requests](file://requests)
- [json](file://json)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `test_trace`
